markdownRemark.html:
[!WARNING] This release upgrades Traefik chart to v40.x which includes a breaking change for the ingress-nginx migration: the provider name changes from kubernetesIngressNginx to kubernetesIngressNGINX. Check https://github.com/traefik/traefik-helm-chart/releases/tag/v40.0.0 for more details

This release updates Kubernetes to v1.33.13, and fixes a number of issues.

For more details on what's new, see the Kubernetes release notes.

Changes since v1.33.12+k3s1:

  • Backports for 2026-06 (#14155)
  • Bump v3.7.4 Traefik (#14196)
  • More backports for 2026-06 (#14218)
  • Testing Backports 2026-06 (#14217)
  • Bump klipper-helm for CVE reasons (#14238)
  • Update to v1.33.13-k3s1 and Go 1.25.11 (#14227)
  • Bump containerd to v2.2.5-k3s1.33 (#14256)
